data.title: A whale traded against James Wynn and “picked up the corpse”, and the final profit was over $17 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ember's monitoring, a whale opened a long position to "pick up corpses" after the James Wynn position was liquidated and forced to close, and sold out $17.08 million in profits two and a half hours ago.
He opened long positions on BTC and ETH twice after the James Wynn position was liquidated and forced to close, with the idea of ​​"picking up corpses": James Wynn's position was liquidated at 12 a.m. yesterday, and he opened a long position; James Wynn's position was liquidated and closed at 1 a.m. today, and he added a long position. However, as the price continued to fall, he chose to sell and close the position two and a half hours ago. As a result, he lost $17.08 million on this long position. After this profit-taking, his profit in the past 21 days has dropped from $30 million to $13 million.

data.title: OpenAI Challenges New York Times Lawsuit Over User Data Retention
data.description:
According to PANews, OpenAI has responded to a lawsuit filed by the New York Times, which demands the indefinite retention of all ChatGPT user chat records and API client content. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman criticized the lawsuit, stating that it significantly deviates from the company's commitment to user privacy. Altman emphasized that OpenAI has filed an appeal and will firmly oppose any demands that compromise user privacy.

The affected users include non-enterprise ChatGPT users and API users who have not signed a 'zero data retention' agreement. OpenAI has assured that the data will be encrypted and accessible only to the legal team.

data.title: Well-known investor Navarro comments on Trump and Musk: The two need each other, and it is wiser to give up the tax cut policy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Naval Ravikant, a well-known Silicon Valley angel investor who has invested in multiple encryption projects, posted on X: "Musk's position is principled. Trump's position is pragmatic. Current technology needs the support of Republicans. Republicans need future technological development. Give up the tax cuts, cut some spending, and get the bill passed." Musk then retweeted the tweet to express his support.

data.title: Uber CEO: Consider using stablecoin payments to reduce operating costs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Recently, at the Bloomberg Tech event, Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi said that the company is considering using stablecoins to reduce operating costs, and believes that the development of stablecoins is very promising, especially for global companies. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in June is 97.5%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to CME's "Fed Watch": The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in June is 97.5%, and the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut is 2.5%. The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in July is 67.3%, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut is 32.0%, and the probability of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut is 0.8%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Federal Reserve's June and July Rate Decisions Predicted
data.description: According to Odaily, the CME's 'FedWatch' tool indicates a 97.5% probability that the Federal Reserve will maintain its current interest rates in June, with a 2.5% chance of a 25 basis point rate cut. For July, there is a 67.3% likelihood of rates remaining unchanged, a 32.0% chance of a cumulative 25 basis point cut, and a 0.8% probability of a cumulative 50 basis point reduction.

data.title: Investment tycoon Bill Ackman: Support Trump and Musk, both benefit if they work together, but both suffer if they separate
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bill Ackman, investment tycoon and CEO of Pershing Square, said on social media that he supports US President Trump and Musk. He believes that for the benefit of the United States, they should coexist peacefully. People are stronger together than apart. (Jinshi)

data.title: US House Committee sets June 10 markup for CLARITY Act
data.description:
The US House Financial Services Committee announced today it will conduct a markup on the CLARITY Act on June 10. This is a great development on the path to regulated digital assets in the US. The bill aims to lay down a comprehensive set of rules for the growing world of cryptocurrencies. With bipartisan support […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/clarity-act-markup-set-for-june-10/

data.title: Trump personally admitted: There is no chance of a ceasefire between Russia and Ukraine, let them continue fighting!
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump admitted during a meeting with German Chancellor Merz that neither Russia nor Ukraine is ready for peace talks and mediation has failed. He revealed that Putin plans to launch a large-scale offensive against Ukraine in retaliation for the Ukrainian army's attack on the Russian air base. Although the Trump administration has tried to promote peace by repairing US-Russia relations and reducing aid to Ukraine, Putin has not shown any willingness to accept Ukraine's conditions. Trump warned that if the conflict continues, both sides may face US sanctions, while hinting that even if the war continues, they will cooperate with Moscow on the Iranian nuclear issue. Jeffrey Edmonds, a Department of Defense official in charge of Russian affairs during the Biden administration, bluntly stated, "Trump is tantamount to surrendering. Now the key is whether he will continue to maintain aid to Ukraine, even if it is symbolic." (Jinshi)

data.title: Trump responds to Musk's question: You could have opposed me months ago, I just wanted to fix the mess
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Trump posted on the Truth Social platform that he didn't mind Musk turning against him, but thought Musk "should have done this a few months ago." Trump highlighted a bill being considered by Congress, calling it "one of the greatest bills ever" that would cut $1.6 trillion in spending and provide "the biggest tax cuts ever." He warned that if the bill is not passed, it will lead to a 68% tax increase and "worse situation." Trump said: "I'm not the one who caused this mess, I'm just here to fix it."

data.title: Citadel Securities President Warns of U.S. Fiscal Challenges
data.description: According to PANews, Citadel Securities President Jim Esposito has issued a warning regarding the expanding fiscal deficit and government debt levels in the United States, describing them as a 'ticking time bomb' that requires careful management. Speaking at the Piper Sandler conference, Esposito emphasized the importance of how U.S. President Donald Trump’s administration addresses these issues. While Esposito does not foresee a crisis similar to the UK's 2022 bond market turmoil, he noted that the current debt levels are nearing their sustainable limits. Additionally, he mentioned that as regulatory frameworks become clearer, cryptocurrencies have emerged as a significant asset class for institutional investors.

data.title: Whale's Trading Strategy Results in Significant Losses
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, a whale experienced substantial financial losses following a series of trading maneuvers involving Bitcoin and Ethereum. After the liquidation of positions held by James Wynn, the whale attempted to capitalize on the situation by opening long positions, a strategy referred to as 'picking up the pieces.'

Initially, the whale opened long positions after the liquidation of James Wynn's holdings at midnight yesterday and again at 1 a.m. today, following another liquidation and closure of Wynn's positions. However, as prices continued to decline, the whale decided to cut losses and close positions two and a half hours ago, resulting in a loss of $17.08 million.

This recent setback has significantly impacted the whale's profits, reducing earnings from $30 million to $13 million over the past 21 days.

data.title: Circle's after-hours price was $87.71, with a daily trading volume of over $47 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to data from Yahoo Finance, Circle's stock price rose 168.48% on its first day of listing, closing at $83.23 and its after-hours price at $87.71. The trading volume on the day reached $47.109 million.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: Circle's listing led to a crypto IPO boom that ended with an EOS-like event
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes posted on the X platform, "What a glorious day today is. Has the ICO spirit of 2017 transformed into the IPO boom of 2025-2027? This is just the beginning of the frenzy. In the end, it will end with a sensational IPO similar to EOS, sucking away huge amounts of fiat capital and plummeting after the opening."

data.title: The number of CME Bitcoin futures major traders increased by 36% from the beginning of the year, reaching a record high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The number of CME Bitcoin futures majors has reached a record high of 217, an increase of 36% from the beginning of the year, indicating that institutional investors' interest in Bitcoin has increased significantly. Since the beginning of 2024, the number of large traders has continued to rise steadily, indicating that institutional allocation of Bitcoin has become a consistent trend rather than an opportunistic transaction. (The Block)

BlackRock purchases $357M in crypto as Ethereum whales accumulate and Bitcoin whales shift to profit-taking.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/blackrock-buys-357-mln-in-btc-eth-amid-shifting-whale-sentiment/

data.title: $41,000 Drained From Woman’s PNC Bank Account – And Her Daughter Is Now a Suspect: Report
data.description:
A woman in Pennsylvania is accused of abusing family ties to steal large sums of cash from her mother’s PNC bank account for personal use. Grove City Police just arrested 55-year-old Lynn Dewey following a bank fraud investigation, reports 21 WFMJ.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/05/41000-abruptly-drained-from-elderly-disabled-womans-pnc-bank-account-turns-out-daughter-now-a-suspect-report/

data.title: What Happens To The XRP Price If The 2017 Fractal Plays Out Again?
data.description:
XRP’s price action is currently exhibiting a back-and-forth pattern around $2. 20, but an interesting technical analysis suggests it may soon leave this price level. A chart analysis posted by a crypto analyst on the social media platform X has given an interesting projection about XRP’s next move. By overlaying XRP’s current weekly chart with its explosive 2017 fractal, the analyst hints that the altcoin might be on the verge of a repeat performance that sends it far beyond its current price range
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-2017-fractal-reappearing/

data.title: Crypto Is ‘The Future,’ House Financial Services Oversight Subcommittee Chair Says
data.description:
Congressman Bill Huizenga (R-MI) said digital assets are “the future” while discussing potential crypto policy during a key House Financial Services Committee hearing on Wednesday.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/crypto-is-the-future-house-financial-services-oversight-subcommittee-chair-says/
